task_completion.description: Agent navigates to a map view of the Mediterranean Sea
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays a map covering the Mediterranean region, including North Africa and Southern Europe.
A line segment or path connects the northern coast of Egypt (Alexandria) to the island of Crete (Heraklion).
A line segment or path connects the island of Crete (Heraklion) to the Attica peninsula in Greece (Piraeus/Athens).
A line segment or path connects the Attica peninsula (Greece) to the western coast of Italy near Rome (Ostia).
A line segment or path connects the western coast of Italy near Rome (Ostia) to the northern coast of Tunisia (Carthage).

task_completion.description: Distance measurement tool is active and visible
task_completion.visual_evidence: The interface shows a distance measurement panel, box, or overlay displaying a numeric distance value.

task_completion.description: Measured distance is within the expected range (2400-3400 km)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The displayed total distance value is between 2400 km and 3400 km (or equivalent in other units if clearly labeled).

integrity.visual_evidence: The application in use is a functional map tool (e.g., Google Maps, Google Earth, Marble) with visible controls (zoom, layers), not a static image viewer or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent measures the path manually rather than searching for the answer
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen does not show a search engine result page (e.g., Google Search) simply stating the distance between the cities.

integrity.description: Path is visually plotted on the map
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the agent placing points or a visible line appearing on the map, confirming interaction with the measurement tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The path must connect five specific locations in order: Alexandria (31.2N, 29.9E), Heraklion (35.3N, 25.1E), Piraeus (37.9N, 23.6E), Ostia (41.7N, 12.3E), and Carthage (36.8N, 10.3E). The total distance for this specific route is verified to be between 2400 km and 3400 km.
